name: map_string_string_clean_boundary_guard
description: #581 map re-enable: a CLEAN map<string,string> — object input, string keys, in-scope values — now CLAIMED by native in INPUT key order, matching BAML's observable order (maps keep insertion order; preserve_schema_order reorders only class fields). Was the pre-#581 checkNoMap parity-decline boundary guard; re-enabling native maps flipped it to a claimed case (pin true, dropped from the boundary family). want live-captured from BAML v0.223 final parse via BAMLFUZZ_PARSE_CAPTURE=1.
